  "findings": [
    "Conductors are undersized for the connected load and circuit length, leading to excessive voltage drop and potential overheating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the installation of the undersized conductors immediately.",
    "Recalculate the required conductor size based on the continuous load and circuit length to limit voltage drop to acceptable levels (typically 3% for branch circuits).",
    "Replace the undersized conductors with the correctly sized wire according to NEC Table 310.16."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing conductors that are undersized for the load and length violates NEC requirements for ampacity and voltage drop, posing a fire hazard and risking equipment damage. Since the work is in-progress, it must be failed and corrected before proceeding.",

    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4"
  ]
}
